title: genista scoparia
intro: Genista scoparia, also known as Spanish broom or broom bush, is a flowering shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Genista scoparia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of menopause. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and its extracts are also used in traditional herbal remedies.
